query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS progression_milestones (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  fromStage ENUM('w2_employee', 'senior_employee', 'contractor', 'certified_contractor', 'business_owner') NOT NULL,
  toStage ENUM('senior_employee', 'contractor', 'certified_contractor', 'business_owner', 'house_member') NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('time_based', 'certification', 'performance', 'revenue', 'training', 'mentorship', 'business', 'approval') NOT NULL,
  requirementType VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  requirementValue VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  requirementUnit VARCHAR(50),
  weight INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  isRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  displayOrder INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  iconName VARCHAR(50),
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS worker_certifications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  progressionId INT NOT NULL,
  certificationId INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('in_progress', 'pending_assessment', 'active', 'expired', 'revoked') DEFAULT 'in_progress' NOT NULL,
  startedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  earnedAt TIMESTAMP,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP,
  revokedAt TIMESTAMP,
  assessmentScore INT,
  assessmentDate TIMESTAMP,
  assessorId INT,
  assessmentNotes TEXT,
  trainingHoursCompleted INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  practiceHoursCompleted INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  certificateNumber VARCHAR(100),
  certificateUrl TEXT,
  blockchainHash VARCHAR(255),
  renewalCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  lastRenewalAt TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quality_standards (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  departmentId INT,
  departmentCode VARCHAR(50),
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('deliverable_quality', 'timeliness', 'communication', 'documentation', 'compliance', 'innovation') NOT NULL,
  metricType ENUM('percentage', 'rating', 'score', 'boolean', 'count') NOT NULL,
  minimumValue DECIMAL(10,2),
  targetValue DECIMAL(10,2),
  excellentValue DECIMAL(10,2),
  standardTierMinimum DECIMAL(10,2),
  premiumTierMinimum DECIMAL(10,2),
  eliteTierMinimum DECIMAL(10,2),
  weight INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS excellence_badges (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('quality', 'timeliness', 'client_satisfaction', 'revenue', 'mentorship', 'innovation', 'leadership', 'community') NOT NULL,
  requirementType VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  requirementValue VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  requirementPeriod ENUM('one_time', 'monthly', 'quarterly', 'annual') DEFAULT 'one_time' NOT NULL,
  badgeUrl TEXT,
  badgeColor VARCHAR(20),
  tier ENUM('bronze', 'silver', 'gold', 'platinum') DEFAULT 'bronze' NOT NULL,
  tokenReward INT DEFAULT 0,
  premiumTierBoost BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
